title: Manipal Digital Health Holdings Services is Hiring: Full Stack Developer (Entry-Level)

jsonLd.title: Manipal Digital Health Holdings Services is Hiring: Full Stack Developer (Entry-Level)
jsonLd.description:
Manipal Digital Health Holdings Services invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Full Stack Developer at our Madurai location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Manipal Digital Health Holdings Services:
Manipal Digital Health Holdings Services is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Kubernetes
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in Machine Learning
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in MongoDB
• Proficiency in REST APIs
• Proficiency in Go
• Proficiency in Microservices

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Life and accident insurance
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Madurai, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Manipal Digital Health Holdings Services!
